options.command: cd {projectRoot} && poetry run nuitka --onefile gd-sudachi/gd-sudachi.py --output-dir=dist/ --output-filename=gd-sudachi-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -f2 -d' ') --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachipy, os; print(os.path.join(sudachipy.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachipy/resources --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachidict_core, os; print(os.path.join(sudachidict_core.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachidict_core/resources

cd {projectRoot} && poetry run nuitka --onefile gd-sudachi/gd-sudachi.py --output-dir=dist/ --output-filename=gd-sudachi-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -f2 -d' ') --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachipy, os; print(os.path.join(sudachipy.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachipy/resources --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachidict_core, os; print(os.path.join(sudachidict_core.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachidict_core/resources

cd {projectRoot} && poetry run nuitka --onefile gd-sudachi/gd-sudachi.py --output-dir=dist/ --output-filename=gd-sudachi-$(rustc -Vv | Select-String "host:" | ForEach-Object {$_.Line.split(" ")[1]}) --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachipy, os; print(os.path.join(sudachipy.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachipy/resources --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachidict_core, os; print(os.path.join(sudachidict_core.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachidict_core/resources
